title: Cell-type-resolved NRXN1 isoforms across human brain tissues and hiPSC cortical organoids.
authors: Cao L et al. (Brennand, Roussos labs)
abstract: NRXN1 undergoes extensive alternative splicing generating diverse isoforms that shape synaptic specialization and contribute to NDD. Cell-type-resolved isoform characterization across human brain tissues and hiPSC cortical organoids.
